content.body: had to confirm I wasn't crazy, and yes, this is how it worked in at least (spidermonkey) JavaScript-1.7.0, which claude nicely got building for me
never standardized; es3 didn't have setters and es5 had DefineOwnProperty semantics for properties
but setters were a common extension in the es3 days
and indeed:
